title: Mobile-first, iframe ≥ 65%
summary: Strict 65% iframe floor. One slim glass top bar, one bottom dock, one swappable sheet for every panel — same layout at 390 and 1440.

title: Single drag-sheet, three detents
summary: One bottom sheet for every panel. Drag-peek, half, or full. The iframe is the page; everything else lives in one swappable surface.

title: Control-Center tiles
summary: iOS Control Center for Playground — one frosted Control button reveals a top-right quadrant of tiles; long-press a tile to expand it in place.

title: iPad Stage Manager lite
summary: One focused playground center-stage, two recessed peers on the left, a frosted dock of saved sites. Esc fullscreens the iframe.

title: Translucent bottom tab bar
summary: Glass tab bar floats over the iframe; one secondary sheet swaps content; chrome fades to 15% when the WP site is scrolled.

title: Pull-down for chrome
summary: Safari-style pull-down: iframe fills the screen, drag the top handle to reveal chrome in three detents — peek, toolbar, launcher.

title: Quarter-pie FAB
summary: A single radial action ball is the entire chrome — press-and-hold blooms a quarter-pie of 6 spokes into one swappable drawer.

title: Vertical reels feed
summary: TikTok-style vertical reels: swipe between your site, a blueprints feed, and your saved sites. One secondary sheet, one verb.

title: 32px micro-toolbar only
summary: A single 32px chrome strip — URL, name, save, menu. Everything else flies in as contextual sheets. The iframe is the document.

title: Ambient side rails
summary: Two 24px rails sip the WordPress site's color and glow it back; hover unfurls one swappable pane per rail. Esc returns to fullscreen iframe.

title: Auto-hide HUD
summary: Video-player chrome: iframe full-bleed; mouse to any edge reveals that edge's HUD; 2s idle and everything dissolves. Esc clears all.

title: Corner FAB pie
summary: One dot in the corner. Click it: an 8-slice pie radiates the entire Playground UI; everything else lives in one swap-pane.

title: One floating capsule
summary: All chrome collapses into a single floating pill above the iframe; everything else is summoned from its menu into one swappable Stage.

title: Single word in a corner
summary: At idle, only the playground name is visible — a monospace pill in the top-right corner. Hover summons everything; the iframe is everything else.

title: Cmd+K is the UI
summary: Zero chrome. The iframe is the whole screen; every feature lives in a single command palette summoned by Cmd+K (or the lone hint pill).

title: Museum frame
summary: The iframe is a framed artwork. Gilded chrome, an engraved nameplate placard that swings open to reveal every panel, micro-typography below.

title: Pull-tab from the right
summary: A single 24px vertical pull-tab on the iframe's right edge is the only door to Site Manager — snap detents at 25/50/75% expose one swappable pane.

title: Quiet-rail-to-loud
summary: A 56px monochrome left rail is the entire idle chrome; clicking an icon expands one loud 320px pane next to it.

title: Bottom dock + mini-panel
summary: Every site is a 48px favicon in a bottom dock; clicking it switches and floats its Site-Manager mini-panel above — one gesture, one surface.

title: One segmented secondary
summary: Iframe on top, a single bottom pane on the bottom — a 6-way segmented control is the entire secondary navigation, with a resizable divider and one-click fullscreen.

title: Stage Manager v2
summary: Focused playground at 80% center; two recessed saved-site thumbnails on the left; bottom dock of five tool tiles; one panel that rises from the dock and swaps content; click a peer to swap-zoom.

title: Chip windows
summary: Each Site Manager section lives in the toolbar as a minimized window-chip; click to expand into a small draggable card over the iframe.

title: Smart resize
summary: Two panes always present. Whichever you interact with grows; the other shrinks. No drag handle — focus IS the layout.

title: Snap-to-iframe
summary: 70/30 split at idle (iframe / one swappable pane). Double-click the iframe to snap to full-bleed with chrome auto-hidden. Esc returns.

title: Browser tabs across the top
summary: Each saved playground is a real browser tab; '+' tab is the launcher; URL bar's https-style pill carries the save state; DevTools dock holds Site Manager.

title: Omnibox
summary: A single top-center combobox is the entire chrome: URL navigation, blueprint search, command palette, and quick actions through one input.

title: Status-only top bar
summary: A 24-pixel typographic readout — PHP, WP, save-state, blueprint — with zero buttons; ⌘K is the door to everything.

title: Fade-on-focus
summary: Solid DevTools top bar that fades to a 20% translucent corner capsule the moment your pointer enters the iframe.

title: Breadcrumbs nav
summary: Every navigation is a single breadcrumb trail at the top of the iframe — each crumb is a hover-dropdown that swaps the secondary pane's contents.

title: Two-row top bar
summary: Row 1 is who you are (URL + identity); row 2 is what you can do — and row 2 swaps to match the active mode.

title: Left gutter
summary: A 48px monochrome icon rail on the left is the entire UI. No top bar. 8 doors. The iframe owns every other pixel.

title: Top bar with embedded Apple-style traffic lights
summary: macOS traffic lights, repurposed: red = Settings, yellow = Refresh, green = Save+state. Familiar shape, unfamiliar use, one IA.

title: Three glass surfaces, max
summary: Three named glass surfaces — top capsule, bottom dock, right depth pane — and nothing else translucent. Quantified restraint, ambient color earns its keep.

title: Content-aware tint
summary: Glass chrome samples the iframe's dominant color and tints itself to complement — every boot produces a different chrome.

title: Three-layer depth
summary: Three z-levels of glass — backdrop (library), secondary (manager), primary (iframe + slim capsule) — make hierarchy literal as depth.

title: Corner-widget Control Center
summary: Four frosted corner widgets stand sentinel over a full-bleed iframe. Each owns one feature, shows live status, and expands into its quadrant on click.

title: Mobile-first × DevTools dock
summary: One bottom tab bar at every size; tapping a tab docks a resizable DevTools-style panel under the iframe — iframe never disappears.

title: Tabs-only x auto-hide
summary: One slim tab strip is the entire chrome; click the iframe to immerse, Esc to recall — site tabs left, view tabs right, no sidebars.

title: Cmd+K × Glass
summary: Every action lives in a content-aware frosted palette; idle shows two glass capsules; the iframe is the only opaque thing.
